title: waltheria communis var. lanata
intro: Waltheria communis var. lanata, also known as the woolly waltheria, is a plant species that belongs to the family Sterculiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Waltheria communis var. lanata include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
